# Uniterm

> The local-first cross-platform terminal multiplexer built for agentic engineering. Bundles eight agent runners (Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Gemini CLI, Aider, Kiro CLI, Hermes, OpenClaw), speaks the OSC 777 notify protocol for live pane-header status, and runs everything on your machine. No account, no cloud, no telemetry.

Uniterm is a free desktop app for macOS, Windows, and Linux. It ships a project-scoped sidebar, unlimited split panes, workspace persistence, a command palette, tasks (kanban with validation evidence), multi-agent workflows with role hand-offs, layouts, the Observatory control panel, hundreds of bundled themes (full iTerm2 Color Schemes and Omarchy collections — 500+ in the box), and full Ghostty `.conf` compatibility for any extra theme on disk. Built with Tauri v2 + Rust and xterm.js 6 (DOM renderer). Direct ConPTY FFI on Windows for 24-bit truecolor. No login, no subscription.

## Core

- [Home](https://uniterm.dev/): overview, install command, and feature tour
- [Full content (markdown)](https://uniterm.dev/llms-full.txt): every section of the site inlined

## Install

- macOS 12+ (Apple Silicon / Intel): `curl -fsSL https://uniterm.dev/install.sh | sh`
- Windows 10 1809+ (ConPTY): `iwr https://uniterm.dev/install.ps1 | iex`
- Linux (Ubuntu 22.04+ / WebKitGTK 4.1): `curl -fsSL https://uniterm.dev/install.sh | sh`

## Resources

- [Source](https://github.com/maxart/uniterm): GitHub repository
- [Readme](https://github.com/maxart/uniterm#readme): project documentation
- [License](https://github.com/maxart/uniterm/blob/main/LICENSE): O'App License
- [Omarchy themes](https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/52/themes): theme gallery compatible with Uniterm
- [Ghostty themes](https://terminalcolors.com/ghostty/): theme gallery compatible with Uniterm
